debug_info.goal:
X : Type u_1
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace X
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace X
inst✝¹ : LocallyCompactSpace X
inst✝ : T2Space X
μ : ComplexMeasure X
h : ∀ (f : ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap X ℂ), μ.integral ⇑f = 0
⊢ μ = 0

failed_attempts:
ext1
  · apply RealRMK.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero
    intro f
    simpa [integral_re_re] using congr_arg Complex.re (h (f.mapRange _ Complex.continuous_ofReal rfl))
  · apply RealRMK.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero
    intro f
    simpa [integral_im_re] using congr_arg Complex.im (h (f.mapRange _ Complex.continuous_ofReal rfl))

simpa using congr_arg Complex.re (h (f.mapRange (↑) rfl)))
    exact VectorMeasure.ext_iff.1 h_re s hs
  · have h_im : μ.im = 0 := SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_forall_integral_at_infinity_eq_zero (fun f ↦ by
      simpa using congr_arg Complex.im (h (f.mapRange (↑) rfl)))
    exact VectorMeasure.ext_iff.1 h_im s hs

exact congr_arg Complex.re h_int
  · apply SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_cc_eq_zero
    intro f
    have h_int := h (f : C₀(X, ℂ))
    rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_real_real (f : C₀(X, ℝ))] at h_int
    exact congr_arg Complex.im h_int
simpa [ComplexMeasure.integral_im] using congrArg Complex.im (h f)).ext E mE

refine ComplexMeasure.ext ?_ ?_
  · refine SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_forall_integral_continuous_compact_support_eq_zero (fun f ↦ ?_)
    simpa using congr_arg Complex.re (h f)
  · refine SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_forall_integral_continuous_compact_support_eq_zero (fun f ↦ ?_)
    simpa using congr_arg Complex.im (h f)

apply ComplexMeasure.ext_integral
  intro f
  exact h f

apply VectorMeasure.ext_re_im
  · refine SignedMeasure.ext_integral_zeroAtInfty (fun f => ?_)
    simpa [ComplexMeasure.integral_re] using h (f.mapRange (↑) Complex.ofReal_zero)
  · refine SignedMeasure.ext_integral_zeroAtInfty (fun f => ?_)
    simpa [ComplexMeasure.integral_im] using h (f.mapRange (↑) Complex.ofReal_zero)

apply VectorMeasure.ext_integral_continuousMap_compactSupport
  intro f
  exact h f

intro f
    rw [← ComplexMeasure.integral_imagPart, h, Complex.im_zero]
by simpa using congr_arg Complex.im (h f)

ext i hi
  apply Complex.ext <;> simp [← VectorMeasure.re_apply, ← VectorMeasure.im_apply, *]

rfl
  · rw [← VectorMeasure.imaginaryPart_apply, SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero (λ f ↦ by simp [integral_imaginaryPart, h])]
    rfl

have h_re : μ.re = 0 := SignedMeasure.ext_integral_compactlySupported (fun f ↦ by
    rw [SignedMeasure.integral_zero, ← ComplexMeasure.integral_re, h f, Complex.zero_re])
  have h_im : μ.im = 0 := SignedMeasure.ext_integral_compactlySupported (fun f ↦ by
    rw [SignedMeasure.integral_zero, ← ComplexMeasure.integral_im, h f, Complex.zero_im])
  ext s hs
  simp [Complex.ext_iff, ← VectorMeasure.re_apply μ hs, ← VectorMeasure.im_apply μ hs, h_re, h_im]

ext s hs
  exact ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator_eq_zero hs h

apply VectorMeasure.ennreal_variation_zero.1
  apply Measure.measure_univ_eq_zero.1
  rw [ComplexMeasure.ennreal_variation_total_X_eq_iSup_integral]
  simp [h]
